description_long: This object is a firearm with a robust wooden stock and a dark metal receiver and barrel assembly. The barrel is relatively long and features a perforated heat shield or barrel shroud along its length, which is typical for certain military firearms. The magazine is a large, round drum type, positioned beneath the receiver, suggesting a high ammunition capacity. The trigger guard is rounded and encloses a simple trigger mechanism, with the trigger itself clearly visible. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on durability and function, and the wood stock is textured with a carved or embossed pattern for grip.
description: A military-style shotgun with a wooden stock, dark metal barrel, and a prominent drum magazine. The barrel is shrouded and the trigger guard is rounded.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular opening of the barrel and the round drum magazine directly beneath it.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the wooden stock, the perforated barrel shroud, and the drum magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the end of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel and magazine.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with the wooden stock and metal components clearly visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a perforated barrel shroud
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
